name: Rolipram cAMP-PKA proteasome activation in tauopathy mice
summary: Mouse tauopathy experiments testing whether rolipram-mediated cAMP-PKA activation increases proteasome function, reduces tau pathology, and improves cognition in early versus late disease.
model_system: rTg4510 tauopathy mice, Ub-G76V-GFP reporter mice, cortical slices, and purified mouse brain proteasomes
